mustPass: Has a dedicated home route and contact route.
Routes reflect the industry's actual need to explain services and treatment/process context.
Every default route has a matching sectionsPerRoute entry.
Primary CTA is contact-focused and aligned with the operator brief.
All paths are Swedish, lowercase and slash-prefixed.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Generic portfolio or blog routes with no clear relevance to avloppsrening.
Invented environmental results, certifications, permits or treatment capacities.
Restaurant, webshop or appointment-booking patterns that do not fit the industry.
Overpromising emergency response or service coverage unless verified.
